metadata.description: FCxO Toolkit marketplace - operational skills for fractional executives.

plugins.name: fcxo-toolkit
plugins.description: Operational toolkit for fractional executives (CEO/CMO/CSO/CTO/COO/CFO): find and win clients (research, qualify, outreach, call prep, proposals), deliver and retain (status updates, decision reports, onboarding plans, renewal reviews, branded client reports), market yourself, and run the back-office of a solo practice. Role-aware, works standalone, shell-free so it runs the same in Claude Code and Claude Cowork, anchored on a lightweight markdown practice workspace.
